name: IZNES
oneliner: Pan-European blockchain-native fund subscription and lifecycle platform — tokenised UCITS distribution with the ECB, Banque de France, and Euroclear on the cap table.
finserv: AMF-regulated; ECB and Banque de France wholesale-CBDC settlement pilots; Euroclear is a strategic investor. Consortium shareholders include major European asset managers.
team: French fund-industry veterans; consortium-governance model gives it institutional access but slows velocity. Euroclear alignment is the moat.
thesis: Fund tokenisation at UCITS scale is the sleeper of the Caroline Federal thesis. IZNES is the only European platform actually settling subscriptions on-chain with ECB participation — making it a serious candidate to become the 'Euroclear for tokenised funds' under the DLT Pilot Regime.
